info.title: Callingly API
info.description: Callingly is a lead response automation platform that instantly calls your team when a new lead comes in. The API allows managing calls, leads, teams, agents, clients, SMS, and webhooks.

post.summary: Create a new call / trigger a lead call
post.description: Create a new call / trigger a lead call

get.summary: List agents assigned to a team
get.description: List agents assigned to a team

put.summary: Update agents assigned to a team
put.description: Update agents assigned to a team

put.summary: Update agent settings within a team
put.description: Update agent settings within a team

delete.summary: Remove an agent from a team
delete.description: Remove an agent from a team

bearerAuth.description: Bearer token from Callingly dashboard Settings > API Keys

message.description: SMS message body, supports Liquid template variables
